summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Supabase auth migration and GeneralChat feature. Backend APIs working well (92.9% success), frontend mostly functional but has Supabase login issues and UI overlay problems.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 400 when email already exists (expected behavior)

working_features: Analyze endpoint with Gemini 3 Flash working

critical_bugs.issue: Login failing with 400 error from Supabase auth endpoint
critical_bugs.error_details: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 400 () at https://grchmdtogimkpchswxig.supabase.co/auth/v1/token?grant_type=password

ui_bugs.issue: Button exists but GeneralChat modal not opening due to Emergent badge overlay interference
ui_bugs.workaround: Button can be clicked with force=True but modal doesn't appear

working_features: Page loads correctly with proper styling
Navbar with login button present and functional
Floating chat button present in DOM (bottom-right position)
Scan button working and opens camera modal
Auth modal opens with Supabase registration form

passed_tests: Backend general-chat endpoint with user profile
Backend user login/logout with old auth system
Backend analyze endpoint with Gemini integration
Frontend scan button and camera modal
Floating chat button presence in DOM

Fix GeneralChat modal not opening when floating chat button is clicked - check for JavaScript errors or modal rendering issues
